title: ProviderPluginScanGlobalMethod
description: Contract for providerPlugin.scanGlobal JSON-RPC method. Starts a read-only scan of the Claude global user settings layer for plugin declarations.

ProviderPluginScanGlobalResponse.title: ProviderPluginScanGlobalResponse
ProviderPluginScanGlobalResponse.description: Immediate response — the scan runs asynchronously. Errors: conflict_error (1005) if a scan is already running.

operationId.description: ID of the created scan operation
